title: First Conditional Input Example
description: A canonical text-input example. Text mode is case-insensitive, trimmed, and whitespace-collapsed by default, so the minimal validation object needs no flags at all.

questions.title: What is the grammar name for the pattern 'If it rains, we will stay inside'?
questions.description: Type the standard label used in English-learning materials.
questions.explanation: This sentence describes a real future possibility, which is why it is called the first conditional. Text mode is forgiving by default, so learners may type extra spaces or different capitalization without changing the result.
